lane_claim: Paper 7 wave8 Manager 5, Gate 6 DHR / AQFT. YOU ARE A SECTION MANAGER. Use $autonomous-orchestrator methods only; do not use Codex built-in subagents. You may launch up to six leaf workers, and workers may not spawn descendants. Implementation-enforcement mode: every worker owns exactly one Agda symbol family and must return code, targeted Agda validation, exact typed/compiler blocker, or authority escalation. No roadmap-only output. Worker lanes: ConcreteSectorConstructors; LocalizedEndomorphisms; IntertwinersTensorFusion; DualsAndFrobenius; BraidingHexagon; DRReconstructionBoundary. Immediate mechanical targets include p2ReImOrthogonal and primeSectorOrthogonal if still open; arbitrary-sector carrier predicate and global foreign-lane identity remain the main blockers. DR/Tannaka stays authority unless exact receipt is supplied.
